pages.title: Metal Shaping
pages.text: The Crude Anvil and Smithing Anvil shape metal.$(p)$(bold)Shaping order:$()$(li)Place the pattern$(li)Add the required ingots$(li)Heat to minimum forge heat$(li)Hammer to the shown hit count$(p)Tool heads, armour bases, and armour plates are all finished as separate parts before assembly.

pages.title: Assembly
pages.text: Bring compatible finished parts to the Toolmaker's Station.$(p)$(bold)Tools$() use a head, handle, and any required support parts.$(p)$(bold)Armour$() uses a leather or chainmail base plus an optional plate.$(p)Changing any recorded component can change the calculated result.
